title: Skin Totem 3D Edition 2
description: Skin Totem replaces the Totem of Undying with your own Minecraft skin! When you cheat death, it’s your face that brings you back. Perfect for flexing your style, making friends laugh, or adding a personal touch to your survival saves.
body:
Description
Skin Totem 3D 2 is a simple Minecraft resource pack that replaces the Totem of Undying with your own Minecraft skin! Now, when you cheat death, it’s your own face that saves the day. Perfect for adding personality, laughs, or a custom touch to your survival experience. Now with different style from v1. Now the character model is facing away instead of directy facing front. It looks like you are holding a doll instead of the youtuber style in the first version.

 

📦 Features
1.Replaces Totem of Undying with your player skin

2.Works in all Minecraft versions that support custom resource packs

3.Great for content creators, SMPs, and personal flair

4.Lightweight — no performance impact

5.3D skin totem different from v1

🛠️ How to Install
Download and unzip the resource pack

Go to:
assets > minecraft > textures > item

Replace the placeholder file named skin.png with your Minecraft skin

Make sure the file is named exactly: skin.png

Re-zip the folder (opional but put eveything into a folder if you dont Re-zip) and move it to your resourcepacks folder

Launch Minecraft, go to Options > Resource Packs, and enable Skin Totem

✅ Done! Now your totem wears your skin.
